meaning: adj.[迚ｩ]辜ｭ逕ｵ蟄千噪,辜ｭ遖ｻ蟄千噪
examples: Alternately, electron emission may be by thermionic means.
The thermionic emission cooling employing hetero structure is a high efficient cooling method.
The results show that the efficiency approaches to that of the caesium thermionic energy converter.
Transistor radios got cheaper and better and, within a decade, had killed off the thermionic-valve industry.
